text.message: Green, what spot are you thinking of going?
I just don’t want to be plowed yk, deals can always be made
take what is best for you
not just gonna gang rob red
i robbed red first then rolled a 7
10 block just doesnt do much tbh
should stop the dev players who are your comp but up to you
I just want to settle man
Ofc I get it when I’m over 7
red going to city next turn blue
no way dude is that why he ported for 2 ore and then didnt spend them?
just think you block was silly
He’s doing it so I am less likely to love knight
Which is just the wrong play
Are you just gonna ignore green
i have to get a city to be a threat
i have no ore or wheat
luck is not lucking for me
luck is lucking for that guy
Idk why red isn’t blocking green at all
was obvious he had best set up
he knows im not a threat
how do i get my last points lol
he's mad that i stole from him one time and that one steal completely ruined that game
9 rolled once and just got monoed
i mean i was never the block
and if he focused on porting and building cities intest of just buying devs he wouldve won by now
you just didnt look at win cons
I’m on the 6 and it barely rolled compared to 8
if you would like to coach someone, probably don't go after the guy with the better win rate
my dev luck just aint it
To be fair green you’ve played 10 games
should I play more or less
The more games you play the closer you get to the avg
